message:
chore(beads): close EventSeverity-ordering bead now that the test landed

Single-line drift sync absorbing the in_progress → closed transition
for bead flywheel_connectors-mkcni ("EventSeverity ordering"), which
the parallel agent flipped after the feature + test landed in
95d7631b0.

Pure tracking sync — no source code, test code, or configuration
changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-mhbhe","title":"TEST-FUZZ-X: validate_source_symbols range gate fuzz","description":"Fuzz fcp_store::validate_source_symbols (symbol_store.rs:29) — the DoS-resistance gate that bounds source_symbols at MAX_SOURCE_SYMBOLS=56_403 before any preallocation under a global write lock (br-ywpup). NOT covered as a discrete unit. Properties: (1) source_symbols == 0 → InvalidSymbol; (2) source_symbols > 56_403 → InvalidSymbol; (3) source_symbols ∈ [1, 56_403] → Ok(()); (4) error reason carries the rejected count and bound; (5) determinism. Once-gated anchors verify boundary values 0, 1, 56_402, 56_403, 56_404, u32::MAX.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"jemanuel","created_at":"2026-04-28T01:54:53.265337Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-04-28T02:07:22.439419Z","closed_at":"2026-04-28T02:07:22.439146Z","close_reason":"Completed: added fuzz_store_validate_source_symbols and verified cargo check + one-shot cargo fuzz run.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":3231,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-mhbhe","author":"jemanuel","text":"Abandoned during impl: validate_source_symbols lives in a private symbol_store module and is reachable only via async SymbolStore::put_object_meta. Out-of-process fuzz can't call it directly without spinning up an async runtime + MemorySymbolStore. Reverting to open and pivoting to a different in-domain target.","created_at":"2026-04-28T01:55:59Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-mhiv","title":"[FCP2] Computation Migration: MigratableComputation, Checkpoint Transfer, Execution Lease Handoff","description":"# [FCP2] Computation Migration (SUPERSEDED)

This bead is **superseded** by `flywheel_connectors-6o25.4`, which is the canonical Full Profile Computation Migration plan.

---

## Original Content (kept for history)

## Goal
Implement the computation migration protocol from V2 spec section 16, enabling:
- MigratableComputation state management
- Checkpoint creation and transfer as symbols
- Execution lease ownership transfer during migration
- Resume on target device from checkpoint

## Normative Requirements (from FCP Specification V2 section 16)
- Checkpoints MUST be content-addressed objects distributed via symbols
- Execution leases MUST be transferred before resumption to prevent duplicate execution
- Migration state transitions: Running -> Suspended -> (transfer) -> Running

## Implementation Details

### MigratableComputation Schema
- computation_id: ObjectId
- capability: MeshCapability
- state: ComputationState (Running/Suspended/Completed/Failed)
- current_device: TailscaleNodeId

### Migration Protocol
1. Checkpoint current state (serialize + store)
2. Distribute checkpoint as symbols to target
3. Send migration request to target node
4. Transfer execution lease ownership (prevents duplicate execution)
5. Target reconstructs checkpoint and resumes

## Dependencies
- Requires Leases (1n78.34) for execution lease transfer
- Requires Stores (1n78.15) for checkpoint storage
- Requires MeshNode (1n78.17) for migration request routing

## Tests
- Unit tests: checkpoint creation/restoration, state transitions
- Integration tests: full migration cycle between nodes
- Adversarial tests: migration during network partition, duplicate execution prevention

## Acceptance Criteria
- Computation can migrate between devices without duplicate execution
- Checkpoint includes all necessary state for resume
- Migration is audited and produces audit events

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-mhuy3","title":"TEST-CONFORMANCE-39: FcpError stable numeric codes + is_retryable + retry_after contracts","description":"FcpError numeric codes are wire-format contracts that admin tooling, CLI, and connector callers depend on (e.g., FCP-2002=TokenExpired, FCP-3001=CapabilityDenied, FCP-3003=OperationNotGranted, FCP-3004=ResourceNotAllowed, FCP-4001=ZoneViolation, FCP-6004=BudgetExceeded). Plus is_retryable identifies the retryable subset (RateLimited, ResourceExhausted, BudgetExceeded, UpstreamTimeout, DependencyUnavailable, ConnectorUnavailable; External via explicit retryable bool) and retry_after surfaces the suggested delay (RateLimited extracts retry_after_ms, External passes through). Zero conformance pinning despite all three being part of the public contract. cc_2 domain (fcp-conformance + fcp-core).","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T23:10:16.456443Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-04-27T23:11:38.991532Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T23:11:38.991049Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","core","tests"],"comments":[{"id":3133,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-mhuy3","author":"jemanuel","text":"ca0aa0a4 adds fcp_error_codes_conformance.rs with 22 tests pinning FcpError contracts: 12 literal numeric codes across all 7 categories (FCP-1xxx through FCP-9xxx), zero-padded 4-digit FCP-NNNN string format, parameterized code-field-drives-output, External status_code mapping (429->7001, 504->7002, others->7003), is_retryable retryable subset (6 variants), is_retryable permanent subset (8 variants), External.retryable explicit override (both branches), retry_after RateLimited extraction, retry_after External passthrough, retry_after None for non-retry errors. All 22 pass in <0.01s.","created_at":"2026-04-27T23:11:38Z"}]}

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-mkj","title":"fcp.homeassistant: Automation management (create, edit, enable/disable)","description":"# fcp.homeassistant: Automation management (create, edit, enable/disable) (FCP2)

## Goal
Allow agents to manage Home Assistant automations safely:
- list automations
- enable/disable
- (optional) create/update/delete automations

Automation changes can have broad side effects; treat as dangerous.

## Scope
### Read
- List automations and their enabled/disabled state.

### Write (dangerous)
- Enable/disable automation.
- Optional: create/update/delete automation definitions.

## Capability model (illustrative)
- `ha.automations.read`
- `ha.automations.write` (dangerous)

## FCP2 requirements
- Single-zone binding.
- NetworkConstraints pinned.
- Approval gating recommended for any automation writes.
- Receipts + audit events include automation id + action.

## Deliverables
- Operation schemas:
  - `ha.automation.list`
  - `ha.automation.enable`
  - `ha.automation.disable`
  - Optional: `ha.automation.create/update/delete`

## Test strategy (MUST)
- Mock-only tests for:
  - enable/disable flows
  - approval gating
  - audit/receipt emission

## Acceptance criteria
- Automation changes are mechanically authorized and auditable.

Tests passing. Closing.","created_at":"2026-03-09T02:22:26Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-mlaux","title":"Implement remaining fwc benchmark stubs (activation, local invoke, mesh invoke, secrets)","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:14:26.645042Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-25T05:26:15.748503Z","closed_at":"2026-03-25T05:26:15.748341Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["benchmarks","fwc","hardening"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-mlaux","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1z643","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:14:40.182926Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1965,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-mlaux","author":"jemanuel","text":"AFFECTED FILE: crates/fwc/src/bench_cmd.rs

Four TODO markers for genuinely unfinished benchmark implementations:

1. Line 899: 'TODO: Implement connector activation benchmarks once fcp-sdk is ready.'
   - Benchmark: measure cold-start time for connector subprocess spawning
   - Blocked on: fcp-sdk ConnectorRuntime lifecycle being stable enough to benchmark

2. Line 907: 'TODO: Implement local invoke benchmarks once fcp-mesh is ready.'
   - Benchmark: measure end-to-end latency for local (same-host) connector invocation
   - Blocked on: fcp-mesh local routing being implemented

3. Line 919: 'TODO: Implement mesh invoke benchmarks once fcp-mesh is ready.'
   - Benchmark: measure cross-device invocation latency through the mesh
   - Blocked on: fcp-mesh multi-device routing being implemented

4. Line 945: 'TODO: Implement secrets benchmarks once fcp-crypto Shamir is ready.'
   - Benchmark: measure Shamir secret sharing/reconstruction performance for k-of-n
   - Blocked on: fcp-crypto Shamir implementation being complete

These are legitimately blocked on other crates. The TODO markers are correct and honest. This bead tracks implementing them as the dependencies become available. Priority P3 because benchmarks are nice-to-have, not blocking production functionality.

NOTE: The existing criterion benchmarks (crates/fwc/benches/cual_bench.rs, crates/fcp-core/benches/pcs_benchmarks.rs) are fully implemented and working. These are only the gap cases.","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:14:39Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-mlko6","title":"TEST-OAUTH: reject duplicate callback parameters","description":"security-audit-for-saas fallback from cod_1. OAuth callback parsing should fail closed on duplicate known response parameters (code/state/error/error_description/error_uri) before serde form deserialization, avoiding parser-smuggling ambiguity between callback handlers and upstream layers.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T20:34:57.317196Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-04-27T20:50:18.582284Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T20:50:18.581689Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["security","tests"],"comments":[{"id":3012,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-mlko6","author":"jemanuel","text":"fc0f9fe5 ships TEST-OAUTH: reject duplicate callback parameters; verified with env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-cod1-fixed rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-oauth test_callback_from_query (9 passed, 0 failed, 627 filtered out).","created_at":"2026-04-27T20:50:14Z"}]}
